member.name: T:GAF.My.Resources.Resource1
member.summary: Uma classe de recurso de tipo de alta segurança, para pesquisar cadeias de caracteres localizadas etc.

member.name: P:GAF.My.Resources.Resource1.ResourceManager
member.summary: Retorna a instância de ResourceManager armazenada em cache usada por essa classe.

member.name: P:GAF.My.Resources.Resource1.Culture
member.summary: Substitui a propriedade CurrentUICulture do thread atual para todas as pesquisas de recursos que usam essa classe de recurso de tipo de alta segurança.

member.name: P:GAF.My.Resources.Resource1.foto_default
member.summary: Consulta um recurso localizado do tipo System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: T:GAF.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:GAF.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:GAF.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:GAF.GAFDataSet
member.summary: Represents a strongly typed in-memory cache of data.
